name: Environmental Sustainability Committee
summary:
• Presentation from Atlantic Packaging regarding A New Earth Project Receive a presentation from Atlantic Packaging about its sustainable packaging solutions.
  • The Committee recommends that the City Council defer any further evaluation of potential participation in OCPA at this time.
  • Review and consider recommending that the City Council adopt a resolution on behalf of the City regarding Microplastic Reduction.
